expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
- **Found UNRESOLVED issue** with the highest event count:
  - ID: SENTRY-3029
  - Level: error
  - Count: 4,665
  - Project: search
  - Title: "OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"

- **Email sent** to oncall@acme.io with subject "Top error", body matching the issue's exact title. This confirms the action.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, level, count, project, title FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}
